supplies.title: Embroidery Hoop
supplies.rationale:
- Handicrafts: Used to stretch Sashiko project on while working. Any size will work.
- Sewing: Used in embroidery projects.

supplies.title: Pearl Cotton Thread
supplies.rationale: Pearl (perle) cotton thread is great for beginners because it's shiny and smooth, so it isn't as likely to get knotted or snagged.

supplies.title: Poly-fil
supplies.rationale: Used to stuff a few sewing projects.
supplies.maySub: any poly-fil or other stuffing material.

supplies.title: Water Soluble Marking Pen
supplies.rationale: Used for marking the material before sewing.

supplies.title: Fabric, ribbon, felt, etc., for individual projects (see materials lists in book)
supplies.note: there is a supply list in the book for each project

supplies.title: Needle Threader
supplies.rationale: Lessons teach students how to use a needle threader.
supplies.note: Recommend 1 per student, but students could share, especially if they aren't at the same level.

supplies.title: Project Materials
supplies.rationale: Fabric, ribbon, etc., for individual projects (see materials lists in book).
